hairstyle_gallery.title: Browse the Full Hairstyle Library
hairstyle_gallery.description: Scroll through our 500+ AI-ready cuts organized by gender and age. Click any look to preview it on your own photo.

categories.title: Penteados Masculinos
categories.description: Hand-picked men's haircuts — fades, crops, quiffs, buzz cuts, and classic side parts. See real examples before your next barber visit.

categories.title: Penteados Femininos
categories.description: Trending women's cuts — bobs, pixies, long layers, beach waves, and bangs. Preview length, texture, and color before committing.

categories.title: Penteados para Meninos
categories.description: Curated boys' cuts for every age — tapered tops, short combs, and textured school-ready classics.

categories.title: Penteados para Meninas
categories.description: Popular girls' hairstyles — long layers, braids, trendy bobs, and playful curls. Family-friendly previews for every age.

hairstyle_gallery.tip: Every preview is free. New AI hairstyles are added regularly.

usage.label: How It Works
usage.title: From Photo to New Hairstyle in 4 Steps
usage.description: AI Barber is built for fast, realistic hairstyle previews. No install, no signup needed to try.

items.title: Upload a Clear Front-Facing Photo
items.description: Good lighting and a visible hairline give the AI the most accurate map of your face.

items.title: Generate, Compare, and Download
items.description: Generate multiple looks, compare side-by-side, and download your favorite to share with your stylist.

faq.title: Hairstyle Preview FAQ
faq.description: Common questions about AI hairstyle previews, photo tips, and how to get the best results.

items.question: Are the AI hairstyle previews in this gallery free?
items.answer: Yes. You can browse every style for free and generate previews on your own photo with a free trial.

items.question: Will the AI preview match my real haircut?
items.answer: AI Barber renders realistic cuts, colors, and textures that blend with your hairline. Actual results still depend on your hair type and your stylist — we recommend downloading your preview and sharing it with your barber.

items.question: How many hairstyles can I try?
items.answer: There are 500+ curated hairstyles in the gallery, covering men's, women's, boys', and girls' cuts. You can also describe custom styles with your own prompt.

items.question: Do I need to install an app?
items.answer: No. AI Barber runs entirely in your browser — on mobile or desktop. No downloads or plugins required.

items.question: What photo works best for a hairstyle preview?
items.answer: Use a clear, front-facing photo with even lighting. Avoid sunglasses, hats, or heavy filters. A neutral expression with visible hairline gives the AI the most to work with.

items.question: Is my photo kept private?
items.answer: Your uploaded photos are processed securely for generation only. They are not stored permanently or shared with third parties.

items.question: Can boys and girls try these hairstyles safely?
items.answer: Yes. The kids' sections are family-friendly and cover everyday cuts. Parents can preview any look before visiting the salon.

items.question: Does AI Barber support color changes only?
items.answer: Yes. You can preview a color change on your current cut — black, blonde, copper, silver, pink, blue, and more — or combine color with a new style.

cta.title: Ready to Try a New Hairstyle?
cta.description: Upload your photo and preview every look in the gallery — completely free, no install required.
